text.title: Ruby on Rails Service Objects Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for extracting a service object.

step.name: identify-action
step.action: Name the business action with a verb + object: 'PlaceOrder', 'CancelOrder', 'RefundOrder'. Decide bounded context (Order, Billing, Inventory).

step.name: scaffold-service-class
step.action: Create app/services/<context>/<action>_service.rb. Single public #call method. Constructor takes collaborators (user, repository, mailer) as keyword args.

step.name: implement-call-with-result
step.action: Move logic into #call. Wrap multi-write in transaction. Return ServiceResult.success(data:) on success, ServiceResult.failure(error:) on business failure. Raise only on bug-level errors.
step.decision-gate: If #call raises for business failure, STOP and convert to ServiceResult.failure.

step.name: wire-controller
step.action: Controller action: `result = PlaceOrderService.new(current_user).call(order_params); if result.success? then render(... result.data ...) else render_error(result.error)`.

step.name: write-isolation-test
step.action: spec/services/place_order_service_spec.rb (without rails_helper). Test #call returns success/failure for each business path. Mock collaborators.
